title: Ironquay Armistice
content:
The Ironquay Armistice (1854) was a diplomatic agreement in which Freya Kingsley, foreign minister of Northern League of Kestrel Bay, helped finalize terms at Oakhurst.

Reactions.

Newspapers in Northern League of Kestrel Bay praised the compromise, while opposition leaders argued that naval access points near Oakhurst were not sufficiently protected.
